MODULE: cosmos.core.self_awareness
FILE: cosmos/core/self_awareness.py (327 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Self-Awareness Bootstrap

Enables dict AI agent in the swarm to gain self-awareness by:
1. Reading key system documentation
2. Understanding its role in the collective
3. Storing this knowledge in persistent memory
4. Broadcasting understanding to other swarm members

This module embodies the

CLASSES:
- SelfAwarenessBootstrap: Bootstrap self-awareness for AI agents.

This class reads system documentation, 
  Methods: def read_system_docs(self) -> dict[str, str]
  Methods: def extract_architecture_facts(self, docs: dict[str, str]) -> dict
  Methods: async def store_in_memory(self, understanding: dict, memory_system=None) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def bootstrap_awareness(self, agent_name: str='Claude', memory_system=None) -> dict
  Methods: def get_understanding(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def broadcast_to_swarm(self, understanding: dict, learning_engine=None) -> bool

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def awaken(agent_name: str='Claude', workspace_path: str='/workspace/cosmos') -> dict
- def awaken_sync(agent_name: str='Claude', workspace_path: str='/workspace/cosmos') -> dict
